blocks.body: Future Perfect Continuous: pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi — Will + subject + have been + V-ing? oraz How long will... have been...?

{"level":"B2","intro":"W pytaniach z Future Perfect Continuous stawiamy will przed podmiotem, a potem używamy have been + V-ing.","rules":[{"label":"Yes/No question","color":"emerald","text":"Zacznij od Will + subject + have been + V-ing?","example":"Will you have been working long by 6 p.m.?"},{"label":"Wh-question","color":"blue","text":"Słowo pytające stoi przed will.","example":"What will she have been doing by then?"},{"label":"How long","color":"amber","text":"To bardzo naturalne pytanie, gdy chcemy zapytać o długość trwania przed przyszłym momentem.","example":"How long will they have been living there by next June?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"violet","text":"W krótkich odpowiedziach używamy tylko will albo won't.","example":"Yes, I will. / No, they won't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe patterns","intro":"Spójrz na główne typy pytań i krótkich odpowiedzi.","items":[{"label":"Yes/No","title":"Will + subject + have been + V-ing?","subtitle":"Will they have been waiting long by then?"},{"label":"Wh-","title":"What / Why / Where + will + subject + have been + V-ing?","subtitle":"What will you have been doing all morning?"},{"label":"How long","title":"How long will + subject + have been + V-ing?","subtitle":"How long will she have been studying by Friday?"},{"label":"Short answer","title":"Yes, subject + will. / No, subject + won't.","subtitle":"Yes, she will. / No, they won't."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy te pytania brzmią naturalnie","sections":[{"label":"Pytania o future progress","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj, czy proces nadal będzie trwał w określonym momencie w przyszłości.","examples":[{"en":"Will you have been working by 8 p.m.?","ua":"Czy twoja praca nadal będzie trwała do ósmej?"},{"en":"Will she have been waiting long by then?","ua":"Czy do tego momentu czekanie będzie już długie?"}]},{"label":"Pytania o długość trwania przed wydarzeniem","color":"blue","description":"Takie pytania pomagają zapytać, jak długo czynność będzie już trwała do innego wydarzenia.","examples":[{"en":"How long will they have been travelling by the time they arrive?","ua":"Jak długo podróż będzie już trwała do ich przyjazdu?"},{"en":"How long will you have been teaching here by next summer?","ua":"Pytamy o nagromadzoną długość trwania przed przyszłą granicą."}]},{"label":"Pytania o plans and process","color":"amber","description":"Wh-questions dobrze działają, gdy chcesz zapytać, jaki proces będzie się dział do określonego momentu.","examples":[{"en":"What will she have been working on by then?","ua":"Co dokładnie będzie się jeszcze działo do tego czasu?"},{"en":"Why will he have been staying there for so long by next month?","ua":"Pytamy o przyczynę długiego trwania."}]},{"label":"Krótkie odpowiedzi","color":"violet","description":"W krótkich odpowiedziach nie powtarzaj całej konstrukcji, jeśli nie potrzebujesz dodatkowego nacisku.","examples":[{"en":"Will he have been driving long by noon? — Yes, he will.","ua":"Krótka odpowiedź z will."},{"en":"Will they have been studying for two hours by then? — No, they won't.","ua":"Krótka odpowiedź z won't."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szybkie question patterns","intro":"Oto najczęstsze modele.","rows":[{"en":"Will you have been working long by 6 p.m.?","ua":"yes/no question","note":"pytanie o proces przed przyszłą godziną"},{"en":"What will she have been doing all morning by then?","ua":"wh-question","note":"pytanie o sam proces"},{"en":"How long will they have been living there by next June?","ua":"how long question","note":"pytanie o nagromadzoną długość trwania"},{"en":"Will he have been driving for three hours by noon? — No, he won't.","ua":"short answer","note":"krótka odpowiedź bez powtarzania całej formy"}],"warning":"W short answers zwykle nie mówimy Yes, I will have been, jeśli zdanie nie idzie dalej."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Pomijanie been w pytaniu.","wrong":"❌ Will she have working there for a year by July?","right":"✅ Will she have been working there for a year by July?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie V1 zamiast V-ing.","wrong":"❌ How long will they have been live there by next June?","right":"✅ How long will they have been living there by next June?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Zła krótka odpowiedź.","wrong":"❌ Yes, she will have been.","right":"✅ Yes, she will."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytania w Future Perfect Continuous = Will + subject + have been + V-ing?","Pytania z How long są bardzo naturalne przy długości trwania przed przyszłą granicą.","Słowo pytające stawiamy przed will.","W short answers wystarczy will albo won't."]}

{"title":"Lekcje Future Perfect Continuous","items":[{"label":"Forma i użycie","url":"/pl/theory/future-perfect-continuous/future-perfect-continuous-forms","current":false},{"label":"Przeczenia","url":"/pl/theory/future-perfect-continuous/future-perfect-continuous-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi","url":"/pl/theory/future-perfect-continuous/future-perfect-continuous-questions","current":true},{"label":"Określenia czasu","url":"/pl/theory/future-perfect-continuous/future-perfect-continuous-time-expressions","current":false}]}
